title: Chaos Erupts from the Capital to Udon
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: The capital erupts after Yasuie’s death while Big Mom’s arrival throws Udon prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now we've got even more prisoners to execute!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: BJASH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Cough!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hiff

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hiff

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: YeaAah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hff... half...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: gyaha hahah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Buhah!! Buhaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How cruel... so he got caught in the end...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Waha haha!! >

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I just thought of a fun game!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Sink 'em!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry for the delay!! The great Sumo Inferno Tourna- went shall resume at once!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The moment you leave this ring, the blades inside your collars will kill you in an instant!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: that part hasn't changed, but...... [3

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now these two will remain in the water as long as you two are alive.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's stupid!! I've got nothing to do with them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Of course you might think that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if that's the case... Why are you hesi- taking now?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it because they're the RVALS from your genera- tion!? If that's the case...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Then why don't you just die now!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even a person who's committed grievous crimes to get a large bounty...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will drown when submerged in a mere SCM of water!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Then you should get in the ring!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll take you down to end it all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: UWAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Awish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...Who do you think you're talking to?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: DON'T GET AHEAD OF YOURSELVES, YOU BRATS.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why have you been foolishly clinging to HOPE?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you really think you'd leave here alive?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you really think you could win against US?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Oh no, he's grumpy today....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's because he hasn't had any O-Shiruko today...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're all going to die! Every last one of you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Shut up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'm the one who'll decide....!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Where I die!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Huh!? What was that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hey, what's with that noise!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It came from out- side the gate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've lost all communi- action with the guards out there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: 0-Shiruko...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: The "craving" is drawing closer....!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 46 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
